Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) The name of the Fleet.
  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment that contains the Fleet.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) The Fleet description.
  • inventory_log - (Required) (Updatable) Inventory log configuration for the Fleet.
    • log_group_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the inventory log group.
    • log_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the inventory log.
  • operation_log - (Optional) (Updatable) Operation log configuration for the Fleet.
    • log_group_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the operation log group.
    • log_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the operation log.
  • is_advanced_features_enabled - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether advanced features are enabled for the Fleet.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
